title: Request support for sealer build in rootless
body:
### Expect sealer to support the request for help

 [sealer](https://github.com/sealerio/sealer) is a tool for building containers using buildah, I hope it succeeds in building Kubernetes, it currently supports root and sudo modes but not rootless, I hope it supports rootless. I have no idea for this, I hope to get your help ~!

comments.body: Hi @cubxxw , Is this issue requesting the sealer supports builds in rootless environment ? If yes could you edit the title since it is not very much clear about what are you trying to report.

Hi @cubxxw , Could you open same issue at sealer since i think implementation needs to happen at sealer end and buildah maintainers can help sealer maintainers to implement it by resolving any queries they have.
Of course, thank you very much for your help. I am working on the architecture of sealer and I will try to implement it. I learned that rooless mode mounts must be `buildah unshare`
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
